item.outcome: Monthly review complete. Two referrals routed to the Community Services Board liaison through the secure channel. No names in shared notes.
College and Career Night on November 12 confirmed. Kelly owns the counseling booth and the Spanish handout. Yuen owns the trades table follow-up.
Small group lunch bunch continues on Tuesdays. Attendance is strong.
Tabled until the January planning cycle. Spring dates to be set with Dr. Fredericks.

actionItems.action: Draft the parent reminder for Dr. Fredericks.
Update the shared resource list with the new crisis text line card.
